scripts.deploy:lg: npm run build:native && ares-package packaging/lg -o packaging/lg/out --no-minify && ares-install --device tv packaging/lg/out/*.ipk && ares-launch --device tv com.andrewhany.iptvplayer
scripts.deploy:lg:debug: npm run build:native && ares-package packaging/lg -o packaging/lg/out --no-minify && ares-install --device tv packaging/lg/out/*.ipk && ares-launch --device tv com.andrewhany.iptvplayer --inspect && ares-inspect --device tv --app com.andrewhany.iptvplayer --open
